title: Addon for Keep Some Inventory - Farmer's Delight
description: Add support for Farmer's Delight to Keep Some Inventory.
body:
Drop your modded Farmer's Delight items on death!

"Keep Some Inventory" by PuckiSilver allows you to keep certain items on death. "Farmer's Delight" by vectorwing adds many items to your game.

This addon is for people who want any new non-equipment items to drop on death when you are using both of these mods together. This addon configures it so only knives will be kept on death. If you want anything else to be kept, such as the skillet, you can modify my downloaded file. You may also contact me if you think your suggestion will benefit other people or is potentially popular.

Keep Some Inventory uses an exclusion list to decide which items will be dropped on player death. This means any new items added to your game will not automatically be dropped on death. Rather, they will be kept. As such, addons can be used to extend this exclusion list without modifying the source (Keep Some Inventory). These addons are in data pack format.

This addon is compatible with both the data pack version and the modded version of Keep Some Inventory's release.

**Contact Me**

If you'd like to contact me, you can message DeadlyDruid#7906 on Discord.
